text.message: blue - no offense, but is your entire strategy in placement just to be anti-me?
You placed on no wheat and pointed the road just to fight me
Knew I wouldn’t get on ore if I didn’t point that way
Second placement was just best of what’s available
there are a ton of ore spots - confused on why you thought you'd have to build to it
i really thought blue would take 5/4/8 first pick
i didn't know if i did something to make them just throw the game to be against me
everyone picks what they think is the best
green can i get a sheep from you i will give you the next wheat
it's fair i just now think we're both playing from behind due to the actions of them with that
black was going to be crazy strong if he got the brick port
i need black to win the wood port
blue would benefit more from the wood port
not after getting robbed 5 times and my ports taken
i'll toss in a no block for this trade
youve done everything to hold me back i owe you nada
i think you are misattributing your anger
i pulled from you what once?
how did i stop you at all
risky road builder when you can't build
i guess you have the yop
you're gonna find my other dev super funny
im on 4 with a road builder
how am i at all the solo
typically whoever has the most unplayed devs is winning
im done for that was my chance and i didnt roll correctly
Green is so lucky with these rolls lol
i got mono last pull btw do i take the sheep from black
you needed it to win huh
i just havent needed to move it
i was a anti-7 from the win before that
